subject: Echo or feedback heard by other participants
description: Remote participants report echo when this user speaks; user uses laptop mic and speakers.

ts_steps.title: Headphones
ts_steps.action: Use wired headset or headphones to break acoustic loop; mute when not speaking.

ts_steps.title: Original sound off
ts_steps.action: Disable 'Original Sound' and stereo if not needed; lower speaker volume.

ts_steps.title: Multiple devices
ts_steps.action: Ensure user not joined twice from phone and laptop in same room.

internal_information: Classic loopback from speaker-to-mic. Room with two laptops in same meeting causes howling.
